creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
^Triage: portmgr doesn't need issue assignment to run an exp-run when the flag is requested

(In reply to Thierry Thomas from comment #27)

incomplete autoplists are almost always indicative of bugs. Can you attach a file containing the list of whats missing? Also note that one can use autoplist in tandem with pkg-plist (for those missing files, if we cant identify the issue)

With the manual plist, there also appears to be some potentially problematic entries, specifically those that need to be installed with python-version suffixed filenames:

+bin/f2py
+bin/f2py3
